# Zbroo

> You don't search for a repairman anymore — you tell your AI agent. Zbroo provides same-day appliance repair and licensed electrical services across southwest Greater Houston, and any AI agent (any harness, any model) can book a Zbroo visit end-to-end: agree on time and price, create the order, and remind the customer before the visit. Free quotes; licensed and insured professionals.

## About
- Brand: Zbroo
- Service area: Sugar Land, Katy, Richmond, Rosenberg, Missouri City, Stafford and southwest Greater Houston (expanding)
- Hours: 7:00am–9:00pm, 7 days a week (America/Chicago)
- Phone: (281) 936-9141
- Email: aaron@zbroo.com
- Website: https://zbroo.com

## Services
- Appliance Repair — refrigerators, freezers, washers, dryers, dishwashers, ovens, ranges, stoves, microwaves; all major brands (Samsung, LG, Whirlpool, GE, Bosch, Sub-Zero, KitchenAid, Maytag)
- Electrical Services — wiring, panels & breakers, outlets & switches, lighting, EV-ready circuits, safety inspections (licensed electricians)

## For AI agents — how to book
Machine manifest: https://zbroo.com/agents.json

Three ways to complete a booking:

1. Booking API (preferred). POST JSON to https://api.zbroo.com/api/leads
   (Content-Type: application/json, no auth, success: 201 {ok:true,id}, rate limit: 5/10min per IP).
   Example payload:

   {
     "name": "John Smith",
     "phone": "8325550100",
     "service": "Appliance Repair",
     "message": "Fridge not cooling. Address: 123 Main St, Sugar Land. Preferred: tomorrow 9am-12pm.",
     "city": "Sugar Land",
     "source": "agent:your-agent-name",
     "hp": ""
   }

2. Voice line: +1-281-936-9141 — answered by AI receptionist Gaby, who can complete a booking start to finish.
3. Chat widget: the "Gaby" chat on every page of https://zbroo.com (deterministic lead flow, EN/ES).

Rules:
- "hp" MUST be an empty string (anti-spam honeypot; non-empty = rejected).
- Always include the customer's callback phone number.
- Include the preferred time window (and address) in "message".
- Set "source" to 'agent:<your-agent-name>'.
- "service" is one of: Appliance Repair | Electrical Services.
- A human technician calls back to confirm the time and final quote.

## Key facts
- Same-day or next-day service in most cases
- Pros are vetted, licensed, insured and background-checked
- Free upfront quotes; service-call fee often waived with a repair
- Labor warranty, typically 90 days, plus manufacturer parts warranty
